abilities.name: Monster Hunters
abilities.desc: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets a MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Get Da Good Bitz
abilities.desc: At the end of your Command phase, if this unit is within range of an objective marker you control, that objective marker remains under your control, even if you have no models within range of it, until your opponent controls it at the start or end of any turn.

abilities.name: Bodyguard
abilities.desc: If this unit has a Starting Strength of 20, you can attach up to two Leader units to it instead of one (but only if one of those is a WARBOSS model). If you do, and this unit is destroyed, the Leader units attached to it become separate units with their original Starting Strengths.

abilities.name: Pyromaniaks
abilities.desc: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack with a burna that targets an enemy unit within 6", re-roll a Wound roll of 1. If the target of that attack is also within range of an objective marker, you can re-roll the Wound roll instead.

abilities.name: Deff from Above
abilities.desc: Each time this unit ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit it moved over during that move and roll one D6 for each model in this unit: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

abilities.name: Gun-crazy Show-offs
abilities.desc: Each time a model in this unit targets the closest eligible target with its snazzgun, until the end of the phase, that weapon has an Attacks characteristic of 4.

abilities.name: Ammo Runt
abilities.desc:
Once per battle, when this unit is selected to shoot, it can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit have the **[LETHAL HITS]** ability.

**Designer’s Note:** *Place an Ammo Runt token next to the unit, removing it after this ability has been used.*

abilities.name: Supreme Commander
abilities.desc: If this unit is in your army, its Ghazghkull Thraka model must be your **^^Warlord^^**.

abilities.name: Prophet of Da Great Waaagh!
abilities.desc: While this unit is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Hit roll and add 1 to the Wound roll and if the Waaagh! is active for your army, a Critical Hit is scored on a successful unmodified Hit roll of 5+.

abilities.name: Ghazghkull’s Waaagh! Banner (Aura)
abilities.desc: While a friendly **^^Orks^^** unit is within 12" of Makari, if the Waaagh! is active for your army, melee weapons equipped by models in that unit have the **[LETHAL HITS]** ability.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc:
This unit can be attached to the following units:
- **^^Boyz^^**
- **^^Meganobz^^**
- **^^Nobz^^**

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save (4+): Ghazghkull
abilities.desc: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save (2+*): Makari
abilities.desc: This model has a 2+ invulnerable save. You cannot re-roll invulnerable saving throws made for this model.

abilities.name: Shooty Power Trip
abilities.desc:
Each time this unit is selected to shoot, you can roll one D6:
- On a 1-2, this unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.
- On a 3-4, until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Strength characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit.
- On a 5-6, until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit.

abilities.name: Sneaky Surprise
abilities.desc: Enemy units cannot use the Fire Overwatch Stratagem to shoot at this unit.

abilities.name: Patrol Squad
abilities.desc:
At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step this unit can be split into two units, each containing five models.
(when splitting a unit in this way, make a note of which models form each of the two new units. If you are splitting a unit that is equipped with 1 bomb squig and/or 1 distraction grot, only one of the new units can use that ability during the battle – make a note of which of the new units this will be).

abilities.name: Distraction Grot
abilities.desc:
Once per battle, in your opponent’s Shooting phase, before making a saving throw for a model in this unit, it can deploy the distraction grot. If it does, until the end of the phase, models in this unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

**Designer’s Note:** *Place a Distraction Grot token next to the unit, removing it when this unit uses this ability.*

abilities.name: Dat’s Our Loot!
abilities.desc: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If that attack targets a unit that is within range of an objective marker, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead.

abilities.name: Krumpin’ Time
abilities.desc: While the Waaagh! is active for your army, models in this unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

abilities.name: Splat!
abilities.desc: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets a unit that is at its Starting Strength (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES), re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

abilities.name: Da Boss’ Ladz
abilities.desc: While a WARBOSS model is leading this unit, each time an attack targets this unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of this unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Ammo Runt
abilities.desc:
Once per battle for each ammo runt this unit has, when this unit is selected to shoot, it can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.
Designer’s Note: Place the relevant number of Ammo Runt tokens next to the unit, removing one each time the unit uses this ability.

abilities.name: Full Throttle
abilities.desc: This unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced or Fell Back.

abilities.name: Tank Hunters
abilities.desc: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets a MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, add 1 to the Hit roll and add 1 to the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Attached Unit
abilities.desc: If a CHARACTER unit from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to a LOOTAS unit, it can be attached to this unit instead.

abilities.name: Pulsa Rokkit
abilities.desc: Once per battle, when the bearer’s unit is selected to shoot in your Shooting phase, the bearer can use its pulsa rokkit. If it does, until the end of the phase, improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit by 1.

abilities.name: Drive-by Dakka
abilities.desc: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets a unit within 9", improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

abilities.name: Drive-by Krumpin'
abilities.desc: Each time this unit Consolidates, each model in this unit can move up to 6" instead of up to 3".

abilities.name: Speed Freeks Mob
abilities.desc: If a model from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to a WARBIKERS unit, it can be attached to this unit instead.

abilities.name: Pyromaniaks
abilities.desc: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack with a Torrent weapon that targets an enemy unit within 6", re-roll a Wound roll of 1. If the target of that attack is also within range of an objective marker, you can re-roll the Wound roll instead.

abilities.name: Drive-by Dakka
abilities.desc: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets a unit within 9", improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

abilities.name: Outflank
abilities.desc: When this unit arrives from Strategic Reserves, it can be set up within your opponent’s deployment zone (all other restrictions still apply).

abilities.name: Splat!
abilities.desc: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets a unit containing 10 or more models, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

abilities.name: Big Gunz
abilities.desc: Designer’s Note: Place two Grot Crew tokens next to each Big Gun model when this unit is first set up, removing one each time its Big Gun model loses a wound (a Big Gun model itself is considered to represent its final wound).

abilities.name: Deff from Above
abilities.desc: Each time this unit ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit it moved over during that move and roll one D6 for each model in this unit: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

abilities.name: Attached Unit
abilities.desc: If a CHARACTER unit from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to a BOYZ unit, it can be attached to this unit instead.

abilities.name: Trophy Hunters
abilities.desc: Each time this unit declares a charge, you can re-roll the Charge roll.
